gold.name: Tomas Reyes-Aldana
claims: Tomas Reyes-Aldana was born in Valparaíso in 1958.
Tomas Reyes-Aldana trained as a marine painter.
Tomas Reyes-Aldana turned to printmaking in the late 1980s.
Tomas Reyes-Aldana created the woodcut series Nine Harbors.
Tomas Reyes-Aldana taught at the Catholic University of Valparaíso for two decades.

gold.name: Nine Harbors
claims: Nine Harbors is a woodcut series by Tomas Reyes-Aldana.
Nine Harbors won the Almeida Prize in 1994.
